title: Omnigent: The New Meta-Harness for EVERY Coding Agent - Claude Code, Codex, Pi, More
summary: Omnigent is an open-source meta-harness that allows users to orchestrate multiple AI coding models, such as Claude Code, Codex, and others, as interchangeable workers. It enables workflows where different models handle different stages of coding tasks, includes governance and human-in-the-loop capabilities, and maintains sessions across multiple devices.
writeup: This video introduces Omnigent, an open-source meta-harness for coordinating multiple AI coding models, including Claude Code, Codex, and others, as interchangeable workers. It matters because it lets different models handle different stages of a coding task rather than committing to a single agent. Key takeaways: Omnigent supports model routing across stages, includes governance and human-in-the-loop controls, and maintains sessions across multiple devices.
